options.infoText: Number of Calves (head) -- The average number of pre-weaned calves (default is ~8% of herd number)
Number of HeiferIs (head) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding
Number of HeiferIIs (head) -- HeiferII is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy
Number of HeiferIIIs (head) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers
Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows (all parities, default is ~51% of herd number).
Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on farm.
Initialize Herd? -- Whether to re-initialize the animal database, where the herd animals are selected from.
Breed (select one Holstein/Jersey) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)
Herd Demographics
Breeding Start Day - Heifers (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be eligible for breeding (days)
Heifer Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Combination of ED and TAI
Cow Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI -Combination of ED and TAI
The semen type that makes up a majority of the farm's breedings
Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average day in pregnancy when a cow is dried off (default is 218)
Heifer Reproductive Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for unsuccessful in breeding (default is 500)
Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The breeding period (days) for cows before reproductive programs stop if they fail to get pregnant (days)
Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Minimum daily milk production for do-not breed cow to be culled (default is 30 kg/d)
Number of Times Cows Milked (per day) -- The average or most common number of times the cows are milked, whole numbers 1-3
General Management
Male Calf Rate - Sexed Semen -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen (default is 0.1)
Male Calf Rate - Conventional Semen -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen (default is 0.53)
Female Calf Rate -- The rate female calves are kept and raised on-farm (default is 1)
Wean Day (days) -- Days the calf is fully weaned from milk or milk replace (default is 60
Wean Length (days) -- Days weaning (default is 7)
Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)
Calf Management

Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- If 'TAI' (Timed Artificial Insemination) is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when the 1st hormonal injection is made in TAI programs. If 'ED' or 'ED-TAI' is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when estrus is started to be monitored.
Conception Rate Decrease -- the decrease of the conception rate for later breeding (default is 0.026)
Average Gestation Length (days) -- average length of gestations (default is 278)
Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- standard deviation of gestation length (default is 6)
Prefresh Day (days) -- length of period of the transition before calving (default is 30)
Calving Interval (days) -- current average calving interval (days), used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations
Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 1)
ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol (select one) -- The breeding protocol for heifers (md5CG2P or md5CGP)
Heifer Conception Rate for md5CG2P Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CG2P protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.6)
Heifer Conception Rate for md5CGP Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CGP protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

Heifer SynchED Protocol (select one) -- 2P: two injections of PGF (prostaglandin), watch for estrus after each injection with insemination upon heat detection; CP: 7 days CIDR implements, inject PGF upon removal, insemination upon heat detection
ED Rate for SynchED Protocol -- The estrus detection rate of the SynchED protocol.
Heifer Reproductive programs
Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 1)
ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Cow Presynch Protocol -- The preSynch protocol (1st breeding) for cow in TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
Cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol -- The timed AI protocol for cows in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
OvSynch56 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch56 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 56hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.6)
OvSynch48 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch 48 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 48hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
CoSynch72 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for CoSynch 72 protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
5d CoSynch Conception Rate -- The conception rate for 5d CoSynch protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
Cow Resynch Protocol -- Resynch protocol for cow before/at/after pregnancy check day in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol -- The TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol.
Cow Reproductive programs
Repro Management
Average Holstein Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 43.9)
Holstein Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 1)
Average Jersey Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 35)
Jersey Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 1)
Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target pregnant age in days for heifers - for adjusting heifer body weight (default is 420)
Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows (default is 740.1)
Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows (default is 73.5)
Bodyweight
Farm Level Management
Pregnancy Check Day 1 (days) -- Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the first time (default is 32).
Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check (default is 0.02)
Pregnancy Check Day 2 (days) --  Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the second time if the animal pass the first pregnancy check (default is 60).
Pregnancy Loss Rate 2 -- % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy check (default is 0.096)
Pregnancy Check Day 3 (days) -- Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the third time if the animal passes the second pregnancy check (default is 200).
Pregnancy Loss Rate 3 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy check (default is 0.017)
Average days between calving and first estrus after calving (default is 23).
Standard deviation of days between calving and first estrus after calving (default is 6).
Average length of estrus cycle for heifers (default is 21).
Standard deviation of the length of estrus cycle for heifers (default is 2.5).
Average length of estrus cycle for cows (default is 21).
Standard deviation of the length of estrus cycle for cows (default is 4).
Average days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the ‘PGFatPD’ resynch protocol (default is 5).
Standard deviation of days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the ‘PGFatPD’ resynch protocol (default is 2).
Literature Repro Values
Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level.

Death rate for first, second, third, and later lactations
Death rate for first, second, third, and later lactations
Culling rate for first, second, third, and later lactations
Culling rate for first, second, third, and later lactations
Culling rate for mastitis
Culling rate for udder reasons
Culling rate for feet and leg reasons
Culling rate for unknown reasons
Culling rate for disease
Culling rate for injury

Culling day count
Stillbirth rate
From Literature
Animal Configuration
Methane Mitigation Method -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating dairy cattle
3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)
Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)
Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)
Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the seaweed mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)
Methane Mitigation
Housing -- The type of housing management for the herd.
Pasture Concentration -- Amount of concentrate supplementation provided if animals are housed on pasture. (kg)
Methane Model -- The method used to estimate enteric methane emissions.
User Input -- A bool value indicating if the user will provide the ration or diet formulation they would like to feed to the cattle (true) or not (false).
Formulation Interval -- The length of time in days between when the diets are reformulated.
Ration
Pen Information.
Pen ID -- The index of the pen.
Pen Name -- The name or identifier of a given pen.
Animal Combination -- The valid combinations of animal types that can be in a pen.
Vertical Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor.
Horizontal Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The distance (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor.
Number of Stalls -- The number of stalls in the pen.
Housing Type -- The type of barn the pen is in.
Pen Type -- The type of stalls the pen has.
Max Stocking Density -- The maximum ration between the number of animals in the pen and the number of stalls in the pen.
Manure Management Scenario ID -- The ID number of the manure management practices that are used for this pen.
